---
title: "Jaron Johnstone"
subtitle: "Actuarial Science Student"
image: img/profile.jpeg
about: # https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-about.html
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/JaronJstone
---

Senior Mathematics Major

## Education

California State University, Fullerton \| August 2022 - December 2026

## Experience

Quantech Pensions \| Associate Actuary \| February 2026 - present
